session_server_like_config(3) Library Functions Manual session_server_like_config(3)

NAME

session_server_like_config

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/server_like.h>

Data Fields


session_server_like_init_fn init_fn
void * init_user_data
session_server_like_interrupt_fn interrupt_fn
session_server_like_cleanup_fn cleanup_fn
void * cleanup_user_data
session_server_like_status_fn status_fn
void * status_user_data
tcp_client_handler_fn tcp_handler
void * tcp_user_data
struct {
bool enabled
websocket_client_handler_fn handler
void * user_data
} websocket
struct {
bool enabled
const char * service_name
const char * service_type
} mdns
struct {
bool enabled
const char * description
} upnp
bool raise_fd_limit
int fd_limit_target

Detailed Description

Configuration for session_server_like_run().

Network settings (port, address, WebSocket port, TLS paths) are read from GET_OPTION() automatically. Callers provide callbacks, handler functions, and feature toggles.

Definition at line 148 of file server_like.h.

Enable mDNS service advertisement.

int session_server_like_config::fd_limit_target

Target file descriptor limit (e.g., 65536). Ignored if raise_fd_limit is false.
